G:\progects_c++\cmakl\bin\cmake.exe -E rm -f CMakeFiles\my_app.dir/objects.a
G:\progects_c++\mingw\ucrt64\bin\ar.exe qc CMakeFiles\my_app.dir/objects.a @CMakeFiles\my_app.dir\objects1.rsp
G:\progects_c++\mingw\ucrt64\bin\g++.exe -g -Wl,--whole-archive CMakeFiles\my_app.dir/objects.a -Wl,--no-whole-archive -o my_app.exe -Wl,--out-implib,libmy_app.dll.a -Wl,--major-image-version,0,--minor-image-version,0 @CMakeFiles\my_app.dir\linkLibs.rsp
